name: citation-finder-ai
description: Find and format academic citations in APA, MLA, Chicago, and BibTeX. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: find_citations
tools.description: Search for academic citations by topic, title, or author. Returns structured results for further formatting.

tools.name: format_citation
tools.description: Format a citation in the specified style (apa, mla, chicago, bibtex, harvard).

tools.name: check_doi
tools.description: Validate a DOI format and return its resolution URL and metadata lookup link.

tools.name: generate_bibliography
tools.description: Generate a formatted bibliography from a JSON array of citation objects. Each object needs: title, authors, year.
